officials have intimated that they will
make an effort to have the managers
of the express companies indicted for
alleged blacklisting and conspiracy.


In the injunctional proceedings be-
fore Master I'm Chancery Sherman
this morning attorneys for the en-
ployers again asked that an attach
ment be issued for President Shea,
who failed to appear to testify In re-
Spouse to summons


A crowd of 200 strike sympathizers
early this afternoon attempted to
overturn an Adams Express company
wagon at Canal and Madison streets.
The guards on the wagon made dis
play of rifles. but no shots were fired.
A riot call brought the police, who
dispersed the crowds and made IL ar
rests. Several rioters were severely
dubbed by the police.


The Association Building Trades of
Cook county, with a membership of
$4,000, will meet tonight and discuss
the question of boycotting all build
ings where unfair material is used.
